  1. de.fhdwhannover.integrea.service

    1. processData(List)

Schnittstelle DataService<T>

Typparameter:
T - the gene type used by the individuals produced by this service
Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
CipherDataService, CsvDataService
public interface DataService<T>
Defines a service for transforming raw CSV input data into a list of Individual objects suitable for use in evolutionary algorithms.

Implementations of this interface interpret each CSV row according to the requirements of a specific problem domain (e.g., knapsack, TSP, cryptanalysis) and convert the row into one or more chromosomes that together form an individual. This abstraction allows different data formats to be integrated seamlessly into the GA pipeline.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifikator und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    List<Individual<T>>
    processData(List<String[]> rawData)
    Processes raw CSV rows and converts them into a list of individuals.

  • Methodendetails

    • processData

      List<Individual<T>> processData(List<String[]> rawData)
      Processes raw CSV rows and converts them into a list of individuals.

      Each implementation defines how the CSV structure maps to chromosomes and gene values. Invalid or incomplete rows may be skipped depending on the domain logic.

      Parameter:
      rawData - the raw CSV content, where each array represents a row
      Gibt zurück:
      a list of individuals constructed from the input data
